results.title: Tooth Cementum Annulation: A Literature Review (MDPI 2022)
results.snippet: Source-domain: TCA technique review; annual ring increments in cementum; forensic age + season estimation.
results.judge_reason: Directly relevant TCA literature review supporting source-domain mechanism.

results.title: Age estimation using tooth cementum annulation (J Forensic Sci)
results.judge_reason: Canonical forensic TCA age-estimation reference for source domain.

results.title: Estimation of age based on tooth cementum annulations: comparative microscopy study
results.judge_reason: Microscopy comparison supports polarised-light TCA reading mechanism.

results.title: TCA age estimation: bias and sources of inaccuracy
results.snippet: Source-domain: accuracy 85% ≤30, 60% >60; high precision low accuracy.
results.judge_reason: Substantiates precision-accuracy tradeoff and the 85/60% congruence claim.

results.title: Probing Hidden States for Calibrated Alignment-Resistant Predictions in LLMs
results.snippet: Use hidden-state probes for calibrated predictions and alignment-resistance detection.
results.judge_reason: Hidden-state probes are tangentially related but not null-space probes for model age.

results.title: Awesome Model Quantization (low-bit, 2020-2025)
results.snippet: Quantization papers; spectrum / SVD-band analyses for weight quantization.
results.judge_reason: SVD-band relevant but for quantization not training-step age forensic audit.

results.title: LLMOrbit: Circular Taxonomy of LLMs
results.judge_reason: Generic LLM taxonomy, unrelated to probes or training-age estimation.

results.title: State of LLMs 2025 (Raschka)
results.judge_reason: General LLM survey, no relation to null-space age forensic probing.
